hero.title: Robotics, delivered as a service.
hero.subtitle: You don't buy a robot or run an automation project. You get the work done. We deploy, operate and maintain the fleet, and you pay one flat monthly fee for the output.
problem.title: The work nobody wants to keep doing.
problem.body1: Warehouse and operations work is repetitive and physically draining. Nobody wants to do it, and nobody wants to keep doing it. In Brazil, annual turnover runs past 30%, and payroll charges push the real cost to nearly double the gross wage. Operational labor is hard to hire and harder to scale. Traditional robotics, with its heavy upfront cost and long projects, was never an option for most operations.
problem.body2: Compute became the cloud. Infrastructure became a service. Robotics is next, and that's where Mechron stands.
problem.stat2label: real labor cost, once charges are loaded in
model.title: Physical work, on subscription.
model.intro: A mobile robot with two arms that moves, sorts and handles materials inside your building. We deploy it, run it and maintain it. You just see the work get done, for a flat monthly fee.
model.card1.title: No upfront cost
model.card1.text: No machine to buy and no automation project to fund. You pay for output, not equipment.
model.card2.title: No technical team
model.card2.text: We deploy, operate and maintain the fleet. Your people stay focused on the operation, not on robots.
model.card3.title: Always on
model.card3.text: Consistent output around the clock. No shifts, no sick days, no staffing swings.
moat.title: A fleet that learns.
moat.body1: The hardware is mostly commodity. Anyone can buy arms and a mobile base. Our defensible asset is the fleet that gets smarter with every install.
moat.body2: Your team demonstrates a task a few times; the robot watches what to do and learns to repeat it. Every deployed robot adds new examples, and that shared experience makes the entire fleet better, faster to teach and cheaper to run, which wins more deployments, which create more experience.
moat.body3: This is what separates a robot-rental business from a Physical AI platform: software-like defensibility.
tech.title: One deployment. Continuous improvement.
tech.intro: We handle the full rollout, from setup to autonomous operation. Your team teaches a task with a few demonstrations. The fleet handles the rest and keeps improving with every shift.
apps.title: Predictable indoor environments.
apps.intro: Starting with distribution centers and light industry in Brazil, in controlled spaces where the task repeats and 24/7 capacity pays off directly.
vision.title: Physical work as infrastructure.
vision.intro: Operate hundreds, then thousands of robots at once, selling hours of physical work the way you buy compute and storage today. As the fleet grows, the flywheel compounds and the advantage accrues.
vision.cite: By 2028, Gartner expects more smart robots than frontline workers in manufacturing, retail and logistics. We're building Mechron for that shift.
contact.title: Let's put the fleet to work.
contact.text: Want to know more? Tell us about your operation and the tasks you'd like to hand off, and we'll get back to you.
footer.tagline: Physical AI · Robotics as a service
